$instructions: Add Korean translations to existing deep biography files in scripts/deep-bios/. Each file (001 through 050) already has English content. Your job is to ADD Korean fields alongside the English ones. Do NOT change any existing English fields. Only ADD new fields with the 'Ko' suffix.
guidelines: Korean text should be natural, fluent Korean — NOT literal machine translation
Write as if for a Korean audience who may not be familiar with Western business figures
Keep the same tone and detail level as the English version
For quotes: translate the meaning, not word-for-word. Korean readers should feel the impact
DO NOT modify any existing English fields — only ADD new Korean fields
example:
For a file that currently has:
"earlyLife": "Taught himself programming at age 10"

Add alongside it:
"earlyLifeKo": "10살 때 독학으로 프로그래밍을 배웠다"
